description: Web Audio API synthesis recipes for common sounds — chimes, beeps, alarms, success tones, error buzzers. Use these instead of embedding base64 audio data (which the model often hallucinates incorrectly, producing thousands of bytes of garbage). Web Audio API generates clean tones in real time with ~10 lines of JS.

audioContext.description: Lazy-init shared AudioContext (required by browser autoplay policy)
audioContext.code: let _audioCtx = null; function getAudioCtx() { if (!_audioCtx) _audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)(); return _audioCtx; }

playBeep.description: Short tonal blip — clicks, ticks, button feedback

playChime.description: Three-note pleasant ding (C5-E5-G5 major triad) — kitchen timer done, task complete

playAlarm.description: Repeating square-wave low tone — urgent wake-up alarm

playTimerChime.description: Per-timer distinct chime indexed by timer number — for multi-timer apps where each timer should sound different

params.timerIndex: integer — modulo 7 across C5-B5 major scale notes
